suite.name: Tests

kw.name: Open Browser
kw.doc: Opens a new browser instance to the optional ``url``.

test.name: TC_101 Login With Locked User
test.doc: Verify locked out user cannot access the inventory page

test.name: TC_102 Sort Products By Price Descending
test.doc: Verify products are sorted by price from high to low

test.name: TC_103 Complete Order Successfully
test.doc: Verify a complete checkout flow ends with confirmation

suite.status: Suite setup failed: Variable '${BASE_URL}' not found.
